programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: The Global Auto And Mobility Show
Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Single Mom
programme.desc: Being a single mom is an everyday battle for many women. Financial stress, the lack of support or social isolation are just a few of the problems single moms face. In some Asian countries, single mothers continue to face heavy stigmatism. But one-parent families have been on the rise, due to increasing divorce rates, parental migration, and children born to single women.

programme.title: Experiencing And Understanding The Art World
Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E1 - Food, Glorious Food
programme.desc: Embark on a dangerous tagging mission in South Australia that will show what sharks eat and why they gather in feeding hot spots. Then head north as a team chases tiger, bull, and hammerhead sharks and outfits one with a 360-degree dorsal camera.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E4 - The Social Network
programme.desc: Ponder shark community hierarchies as the northern team studies how young blacktips learn social and survival skills. Then rush to Rainbow Beach with the southern team, who are eager to witness the sand tiger shark’s most elusive behaviour: mating.

programme.title: E1 - Food, Glorious Food
programme.desc: Embark on a dangerous tagging mission in South Australia that will show what sharks eat and why they gather in feeding hot spots. Then head north as a team chases tiger, bull, and hammerhead sharks and outfits one with a 360-degree dorsal camera.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites

programme.title: E4 - The Social Network
programme.desc: Ponder shark community hierarchies as the northern team studies how young blacktips learn social and survival skills. Then rush to Rainbow Beach with the southern team, who are eager to witness the sand tiger shark’s most elusive behaviour: mating.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.desc: Franco Noriega recreates his Italian grandmother's favourite dishes, including a flatbread appetiser, meaty pasta, and a twist on an iconic dessert.

programme.desc: Ayesha and her friends have a day off from the kids,so they're making a decadent girls' brunch together.They enjoy a light Bloody Mary topped with Brown Sugar Bacon.

programme.title: E1 - Stuff It
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro kicks off the fun with his Authentic Chicago Style Stuffed Deep Dish Pizza, Geoffrey Zakarian fries up Crispy Pork and Shrimp Rolls.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: Carol gets a special package from Brazil-a rare Chum Chum Land piranha needing protection. But it escapes and starts wreaking havoc on the town's ecosystem! Now, with everyone's help-and Flippy as bait-Carol must catch it before it devours everything in its path.

programme.title: Trip to Mexico
programme.desc: Alim knows a few countries where it is common to have insects as part of your menu. Our heroes are a bit taken aback. They decide to go to Taxco in Mexico, where Felipe is waiting for them to hunt some bugs! Grilled, they are a local delicacy.

programme.title: Things Don't Always Go To Plan
programme.desc: Acrobatic pair Finn and Kirsten are used to winning medals - they even took home the bronze for Great Britain at the World Acrobatic Championships. But now they will compete as seniors for the first time at the British Championships in Liverpool.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: The more high up in the sky we get, the stronger and less turbulent wind is. If only we could use that wind power as a source of alternative energy ... In this episode, we meet a team of scientists that successfully transmits power from up to three kilometers' altitude.

programme.title: Hopes and Dreams
programme.desc: The Icicles have made it to the World Synchro Championships and are heading to Canada. After a season of flawless performances, can the girls pull off their Bollywood routine? The end of season Gala is near, but preparations aren't running as smoothly as everyone hoped.

programme.title: Day of the Animal
programme.desc: Gavin can't find the right animal costume for the upcoming local marathon. Ricky helps him decide by making a piranha fish bag and a baboon chalk picture inspired by artist Georgia O'Keeffe.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: The more high up in the sky we get, the stronger and less turbulent wind is. If only we could use that wind power as a source of alternative energy ... In this episode, we meet a team of scientists that successfully transmits power from up to three kilometers' altitude.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: Circuit Basics
programme.desc: Smorph's favourite robot toy has stopped working! See how an electrical circuit is made and get the robot working again.

programme.title: To Catch a Fish
programme.desc: How can Oto catch a fish without a fishing rod? Doki and Mundi set out on a spy mission to discover how the other international teams are doing it, and come up with some fun and surprising alternatives!

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: I Would Walk 500 Miles
programme.desc: A game of catch sends Munki flying to Antarctica. He begins the long journey home, meeting strange friends while Trunk crosses canyons, deserts, and seas searching for him. They reunite on a desert island halfway across the world, facing the challenge of getting home.

programme.title: Curacao
programme.desc: Nicole joins local teens Skyler and Diego in Curacao for a thrilling adventure: submarine dive, flyboarding, paddleboarding, and golf!

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: Bum Noises!
programme.desc: Dr Xand has been recording his farts. But why is it they sound so different? And we meet two of our brilliant new Ouchers!

programme.title: Garden Snail
programme.desc: Fiona's art lesson with Orla and Meabh backfires when they get excited and run wild with the paint. Grandad helps Binah appreciate snails on a new level after introducing her to the hilarious world of snail racing.

programme.title: Bum Noises!
programme.desc: Dr Xand has been recording his farts. But why is it they sound so different? And we meet two of our brilliant new Ouchers!

programme.title: The Knockout Cone Snail
programme.desc: Hungry cone snails use their siphons to sniff out fish and worms to eat. When they find their prey, they release a cocktail of drugs that knocks them out, making them easy to catch.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: Bucket
programme.desc: No place to sit? Do not worry, we have the most creative solution for you!

programme.title: E9 - A. Queen of the Black Puddle/The Curse of Shirley/Fishy Business/Angry Nasty People/S
programme.desc: After a rainstorm, a puddle queen materializes at the farm. She woos Eustace and drags him down into her puddle world. Muriel is heartbroken, of course, so Courage must save Eustace.

programme.title: E9 - Meat Your Maker/Karaoke Video/Out Of Commission/Country Club/Paint Job
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the park's annual barbecue, things go awry when Rigby accidentally burns Benson's hot dogs.

programme.title: E446 - Opera For One/Bean Hatches A Plan/Remote Control Chaos/Scrapper's Feeding Time/Preten
programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets to buy tickets to the opera, so he tricks the singer into performing in his back garden.

programme.title: Tom And Jerry: The Fast And The Furry E1 -Tom And Jerry: The Fast And The Furry
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry enter an extreme car race competition called the 'SuperRace' in order to win the grand prize of a beautiful, dream mansion!

programme.title: E432 - Five-Star Bowl/Lost Object/Crab Crush
programme.desc: Jealous, Grizzy tries to switch his indifferent fish with the Lemmings' affectionate and lively fish

programme.title: E26 - B. The Bet/The Flakers/The Bumpkin/The Authority/The Virus
programme.desc: When Bobert becomes Gumball's servant for a week, Gumball realizes robots obey everyone's command... even if that means destroying you!

programme.title: E96 - Gem Hunt/Crack The Whip
programme.desc: Steven and Connie track a Gem monster through the wilderness, but its tracks lead them to mystery.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E615 - Save the Last Pants / A Stella Performance
programme.desc: Rusty tries to bring the fun of Gus's to Duds For Dudes when he's in charge of the store. // Stella wins a school competition and is super excited - until she learns she has to give a public presentation.

programme.title: E105 - Meats of Strength / Dead Ed's
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend. // Jack & Lil try to prove they're the one true local, enduring a series of bizarre quests in the local dive restaurant Dead Ed's.

programme.title: E106 - The Three Ravens / Left Holding the Bag
programme.desc: Ellie & the kids investigate cryptic Mrs. Withers. When Jack goes missing in her creepy home, Ellie and Lil must save him! // Eager to become Master Criminals, Lil & Jack help Chuck with his 'dirty laundry'. But are they ready for a life of crime?

programme.title: E236 - Call the Cops! / Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. // Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: E238 - Appointment TV / Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but will SpongeBob make it home in time to watch? // Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her!

programme.title: E608 - Dine and Bash / Sofa, So Good
programme.desc: After failing to make Chef Guy Grazer a meal on his show, the kids try to erase the footage before it airs. // The kids search all over Royal Woods to find the missing furniture they left outside while cleaning.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E223 - iCarly Awards
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie present iCarly Awards for best user-generated content, giving the awards to the winners live on the web show. Spencer enlists European swimsuit models to help him make the awards statuettes.

programme.title: E329 - Pardon My Wand / Stupor-stition
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes. // On Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

programme.title: E283 - Ma and Pa's Big Hurrah / Yellow Pavement
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise. // You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.title: E231 - My Leg! / Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way...no matter what! // Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well...until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward!

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E113 - From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: E1003 - Spy Dames / Cupid's Harrow
programme.desc: During Grandparent's Day at Lincoln's school, he and Myrtle face off with a spy nemesis from Myrtle's past. // Leni accidentally causes trouble for Lori and Bobby while taking calls on her and Miguel's dating podcast.

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 高冷孤僻的企業繼承人顧榮儼然是個“傲嬌公子”，而看似軟萌文靜的少女蘇靜靜實則武藝不凡。一場意外讓“元氣少女”蘇靜靜與“不食人間煙火”的顧榮產生交集，還成為他的貼身保鏢。性格、習慣大相徑庭的兩人不得不開啟室友生活，在追求人生目標中攜手蛻變與成長……

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E10 - Thomas Makes A Mistake
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E21 - Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E30 - Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E10 - Thomas Makes A Mistake
programme.desc: After Thomas makes a mistake with an important silk delivery in India, he causes chaos and confusion by not seeking help.

programme.title: E8 - Watch The Birdie
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: E9 - Pirate Parade
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.

programme.title: E21 - Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E30 - Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E8 - African Penguins
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Cape town, off the coast of South Africa, on a global adventure to find out why African penguins are living in the city.

programme.title: E111 - Mixed Up
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: E5 - Robot
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'robot' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.desc: The Go Jetters learn about 'symbiosis' - when two different animals or plants help each other.

programme.desc: Andy heads to the Namibian desert in Southern Africa and meets a giraffe.

programme.desc: Roly is trying to force a very large plastic ball into the bin, but it flies out and crashes into a tower that Betty has built.

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a big animal adventure! First, the family takes a tour of the farm, where the farmer shows them all sorts of amazing animals. Then, Jill finds a little lost lamb, & with the help of her siblings, they adventure around the farm to find the lamb's mommy. The animal fun continues as the family visits the zoo to learn about opposites with help from the loud lions & quiet turtles!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E7 - Reptile Rampage
programme.desc: Billy wrestles abandoned crocs, snakes and lizards out of a suburban home, then teams up with trapper Mike to remove some prickly porcupine squatters from a cottage.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E1 - Murchison GeoRegion
programme.desc: Western Australia’s Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its’ ancient landscapes and brilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back to the earth’s beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: E2 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: Songs Of Japanese Spirit
programme.desc: This music program features beloved Japanese songs - timeless classics that have captured the nation's hearts and continue to be cherished across generations.

programme.title: World Weather
programme.desc: Weather information of the different areas around the world.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Nobunaga is enraged when Hideyoshi withdraws from the campaign against the Uesugi and returns without permission, placing him under house arrest and ordering his execution. As the Hashiba retainers plead for mercy, news arrives that Matsunaga Hisahide has betrayed him once again. Narrowly escaping death, Hideyoshi and Koichiro enter negotiations with Hisahide, conveying Nobunaga's terms that rebellion will be forgiven if he surrenders his prized tea utensil, the Hiragumo. Yet despite this extraordinary offer, Hisahide refuses.

programme.title: E104
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Actor Koyuki And The Fermenting Master, Grandma
programme.desc: Actor Koyuki loves fermented food, visits grandmas throughout Japan who are experts in making fermented foods, and learns recipes for local dishes she wants to pass down for the future generations.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E14 - The Hunt For Stolen Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E4 - 楊迪探班伊芙硬控I人一家
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E15 - 中日歌手唱《海闊天空》
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: The Curse Of King Tut's Tomb Part 2
programme.desc: In 1922 Cairo, archaeologist Danny Fremont races his evil nemesis to find King Tut's Emerald Tablet, the ultimate power to control-or destroy-the world. He must brave the Valley of the Kings to solve a mystery that could change history forever.

programme.title: The Librarian: The Quest For The Spear
programme.desc: A bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and he's off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper.
